title: Allegion plc (ALLE) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Allegion plc (NYSE:ALLE ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 26, 2023 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Jobi Coyle - Director of IR John Stone - President and CEO Mike Wagnes - SVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Julian Mitchell - Barclays Joe O'Dea - Wells Fargo Joe Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Josh Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Andrew Obin - Bank of America Ryan Merkel - William Blair David MacGregor - Longbow Research Brett Linzey - Mizuho America Operator Good morning, and welcome to the Allegion Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Call. [Operator Instructions] Please note this event is being recorded.

title: Allegion (ALLE) Beats on Q2 Earnings, Raises 2023 EPS View
text: Allegion's (ALLE) second-quarter results benefit from robust price realization and strong growth in the electronics end market. The company raised its earnings guidance for 2023.

title: Allegion (ALLE) Surpasses Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: Allegion (ALLE) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.76 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.69 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.37 per share a year ago.

title: Allegion (NYSE: ALLE) Reports Q2-2023 Financial Results
text: DUBLIN--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a leading global security products and solutions provider, today reported financial results for its second quarter (ended June 30, 2023). “Allegion delivered another quarter of outstanding operational performance, margin expansion and increased cash flow,” said President and CEO John H. title: Allegion's STANLEY Access Technologies Introduces ProCare™ 8500 and 8500A Telescopic ICU Door to Improve Provider Workflow
text: ProCare™ 8500 has the widest clear door opening in the industry, maximizing working space in small ICUs and easing patient transfers FARMINGTON, Conn. , July 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- STANLEY Access Technologies, part of the Allegion family of brands and leading provider of automatic door solutions and service, today announced the launch of ProCare™ 8500 and 8500A 3-Panel Telescoping ICU Door, the latest design in their ProCare™ Series, one of the most trusted names in healthcare design.
